title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
